## Done When:
This criteria will not be changed from ticket to ticket. All criteria will be met by both the assignee and the reviewer before the task is marked as complete.
- [ ] All Acceptance Criteria are complete
- [ ] New migrations were created for any model changes
- [ ] Branch runs without any errors to changed code
- [ ] Pull request created for this issue
- [ ] All merge conflicts are resolved
- [ ] Merge is complete into `master` after PR review
